properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: As little children, We would dream of Christmas morn And all the gifts and toys We knew we'd find, But we never realized a baby born one blessed night, Gave us the greatest gift of our lives.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We are the reason that He gave His life. We are the reason that He suffered and died. To a world that was lost He gave all He could give To show us the reason to live.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As the years went by We learned more of our gift, The giving of ourselves And what love means. On a dark and cloudy day A man hung dying in the rain Because of love, Because of love.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We are the reason that He gave His life. We are the reason that He suffered and died. To a world that was lost He gave all He could give He is the reason to live.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I've finally found the reason for living: It's in giving every part of my heart to Him; In all that I do, Every word that I say I'll be giving my heart just for Him.
